ops.title: Geocode an Address
ops.summary: Convert an address to coordinates (address=) or coordinates to an address (latlng=). Optional: components, region, language.

request_fields.name: address
request_fields.description: The street address or plus code to geocode.

request_fields.name: latlng
request_fields.description: Latitude,longitude for reverse geocoding (e.g. 40.714,-73.961).

request_fields.name: place_id
request_fields.description: A place ID to geocode.

request_fields.name: components
request_fields.description: Component filter (e.g. country:US|postal_code:94043).

request_fields.name: region
request_fields.description: Region bias ccTLD (e.g. us).

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language for results (e.g. en).

ops.summary: Return the time zone for a location at a given time (location=lat,lng; timestamp=Unix seconds).

request_fields.name: timestamp
request_fields.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) the offset is computed for.

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language for the time-zone name.

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language for results.

request_fields.name: fieldMask
request_fields.description: Required X-Goog-FieldMask — comma-separated response fields (e.g. places.displayName,places.location, or * for all, which bills at the highest tier).

ops.title: Generate keyword ideas
ops.summary: Discover new keyword ideas with monthly search volume, competition, and top-of-page bid ranges from a seed of keywords and/or a landing-page URL. Needs `keywords` and/or `url`.

request_fields.name: customerId
request_fields.description: The 10-digit Google Ads account id to query, e.g. 1234567890 (dashes allowed). Under a manager account this is the client account, not the manager.

request_fields.name: loginCustomerId
request_fields.description: Manager (MCC) account id, sent as the login-customer-id header. Required when the account is accessed through a manager account.

request_fields.name: keywords
request_fields.description: Seed keywords (repeatable). Provide `keywords` and/or `url`.

request_fields.name: url
request_fields.description: Seed landing-page URL. Provide `keywords` and/or `url`.

request_fields.name: geoTargetConstants
request_fields.description: Geo targets as resource names or bare ids (e.g. geoTargetConstants/2840 or 2840 for the US). Repeatable. Omit for all locations.

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language as a resource name or bare id (languageConstants/1000 or 1000 for English).

request_fields.name: keywordPlanNetwork
request_fields.description: Search network to estimate against.

request_fields.name: pageSize
request_fields.description: Max ideas to return per page.

request_fields.name: includeAdultKeywords
request_fields.description: Include adult keywords in the results.

ops.title: Generate keyword historical metrics
ops.summary: Fetch historical metrics (average monthly searches, per-month search volumes, competition index, top-of-page bid ranges) for a fixed list of keywords. Needs `keywords`.

request_fields.name: customerId
request_fields.description: The 10-digit Google Ads account id to query, e.g. 1234567890 (dashes allowed). Under a manager account this is the client account, not the manager.

request_fields.name: loginCustomerId
request_fields.description: Manager (MCC) account id, sent as the login-customer-id header. Required when the account is accessed through a manager account.

request_fields.name: keywords
request_fields.description: Keywords to fetch historical metrics for (repeatable).

request_fields.name: geoTargetConstants
request_fields.description: Geo targets as resource names or bare ids (e.g. geoTargetConstants/2840 or 2840 for the US). Repeatable. Omit for all locations.

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language as a resource name or bare id (languageConstants/1000 or 1000 for English).

request_fields.name: keywordPlanNetwork
request_fields.description: Search network to estimate against.

ops.title: Generate keyword forecast metrics
ops.summary: Forecast clicks, impressions, cost, and CTR for a list of keywords over a future date range at a given max CPC. Needs `keywords`; for full campaign control pass a raw `body`.

request_fields.name: customerId
request_fields.description: The 10-digit Google Ads account id to query, e.g. 1234567890 (dashes allowed). Under a manager account this is the client account, not the manager.

request_fields.name: loginCustomerId
request_fields.description: Manager (MCC) account id, sent as the login-customer-id header. Required when the account is accessed through a manager account.

request_fields.name: keywords
request_fields.description: Keywords to forecast (repeatable).

request_fields.name: geoTargetConstants
request_fields.description: Geo targets as resource names or bare ids (e.g. geoTargetConstants/2840 or 2840 for the US). Repeatable. Omit for all locations.

request_fields.name: language
request_fields.description: Language as a resource name or bare id (languageConstants/1000 or 1000 for English).

request_fields.name: keywordPlanNetwork
request_fields.description: Search network to estimate against.

request_fields.name: maxCpcMicros
request_fields.description: Max CPC bid in micros (1000000 = $1.00).

request_fields.name: matchType
request_fields.description: Keyword match type for the forecast.

request_fields.name: forecastStartDate
request_fields.description: Forecast window start (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to tomorrow.

request_fields.name: forecastEndDate
request_fields.description: Forecast window end (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to 30 days out.
